sentence: 土壤里有数不清的微生物。
pinyin: Tǔrǎng lǐ yǒu shǔ bu qīng de wēishēngwù.
english: There are countless microorganisms in the soil.

sentence: 超市就在这个街区的转角处。
pinyin: Chāoshì jiù zài zhège jiēqū de zhuǎnjiǎo chù.
english: The supermarket is right at the corner of this block.

sentence: 博物馆里陈列着古代帝王的服饰。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ chénliè zhe gǔdài dìwáng de fúshì.
english: The museum displays the clothing of ancient monarchs.

meaning: 1. to input; 2. to throw in; 3. to unload; 4. to put into circulation
sentence: 公司决定在社交媒体上投放广告。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng zài shèjiāo méitǐ shàng tóufàng guǎnggào.
english: The company decided to place ads on social media.

sentence: 工人们正在铺设地下电缆。
pinyin: Gōngrén men zhèngzài pūshè dìxià diànlǎn.
